source_path: 2. Contact360 email system/2.4.100 — Docker email stack blocker evidence.md
title: 2.4.100 - Docker email stack blocker evidence
summary: Docker deployment blockers for `EC2/email.server` and `EC2/email campaign` during endpoint smoke verification.
flowcharts:
flowchart LR
  contract[Contract]
  service[Service]
  surface[Surface]
  data[Data]
  ops[Ops]
  gate[Release gate]

  contract --> gate
  service --> gate
  surface --> gate
  data --> gate
  ops --> gate

contract.text: Lock canonical HTTP bind port contract for `email.server` and compose mapping parity.
Publish complete required env matrix for `email campaign` including `S3_TEMPLATE_BUCKET`.

service.text: Add startup self-check that logs resolved listen address and required env status before serving.

surface.text: Avoid overlap with frontend dev ports (`3000+`) in local docker profiles.

data.text: Align email stack local DB/Redis/S3 dependency assumptions with docker profile defaults.

ops.text: Ship `docker compose --profile smoke` for email stack that includes valid env placeholders and non-conflicting ports.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Docker deployment blockers for `EC2/email.server` and `EC2/email campaign` during endpoint smoke verification.
